final_prompt.prompt:
Create an atmospheric interior illustration of a dark gothic castle (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "暗黑哥特风" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 19th-century Gothic Revival architectural illustration, Zdzisław Beksiński's oppressive surrealist darkness, Castlevania (IGA-era) environmental concept art; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include a towering vaulted ceiling, stained glass windows casting blood-red light, candelabras, and iron chain decorations
Scene/backdrop: must include a castle interior with deep, heavy shadows throughout
Lighting/mood: needs a mysterious and oppressive atmosphere — blood-red colored light filtering through stained glass as the dominant light source, with candlelight accents — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a dark, shadow-dominant direction with blood-red as the accent — exact values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a heavy stone, aged iron, and melted wax surface treatment — exact grain and texture weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid: bright or cheerful tones, modern architectural elements, flat lighting
